level_signals: 8+ years of experience in platform engineering, observability, reliability, or technical product management roles

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Bachelor of Science or Engineering (or equivalent experience) with 8+ years of experience in platform engineering, observability, reliability, or technical product management roles.
5+ years of hands-on experience with Dynatrace SaaS, including Davis AI, DQL, Grail, and log analytics.
Define and own the product vision and roadmap for Dynatrace Intelligence, including Davis AI, Grail, and AI-powered analytics.
Hands-on experience configuring and tuning Davis AI, DQL queries, Grail data models, and Gen3 dashboards.
Strong understanding of AI/ML concepts as applied to AIOps, including anomaly detection, causality, signal-to-noise optimization, and predictive analytics.
Deep knowledge of distributed systems, microservices, cloud-native architectures, and SaaS platforms.
Proven ability to translate technical capabilities into product outcomes and business value.
Define KPIs tied to availability, MTTR reduction, alert quality, cost optimization, and operational automation.
Bachelor of Science or Engineering (or equivalent experience)

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience with Kubernetes, cloud platforms, and large-scale SaaS environments.
Familiarity with automation, DevOps, CI/CD, and IaC practices.
Background in financial services or regulated enterprise environments.
Strong executive communication and stakeholder management skills.

scope.surface: Dynatrace Intelligence observability platform within Charles River Investment Management Solution (CRIMS)
scope.business_model: B2B SaaS — enterprise investment management platform (front, middle, back office)
core_responsibilities: Define and own the product vision and roadmap for Dynatrace Intelligence including Davis AI, Grail, and AI-powered analytics
Drive use cases for anomaly detection, root cause analysis, event correlation, predictive capacity, and auto-remediation
Configure and tune Davis AI, DQL queries, Grail data models, and Gen3 dashboards hands-on
Define KPIs tied to availability, MTTR reduction, alert quality, cost optimization, and operational automation
Act as the primary product interface for observability intelligence with internal stakeholders and strategic clients
Drive enablement across product, support, and engineering teams on AI-driven observability
Establish governance for AI models, alerting standards, and observability data usage

green_flags: Very specific technical requirements reduce ambiguity about fit
Clear product surface and ownership area (Dynatrace Intelligence within CRIMS)
Role embedded in a named, market-leading product (CRIMS)

Heavy reliance on a single vendor (Dynatrace) — role scope may narrow significantly if platform changes
No mention of visa sponsorship — unclear for international candidates
Location listed as Burlington, MA (onsite implied) with no mention of remote or hybrid flexibility
High buzzword density throughout JD may obscure actual day-to-day responsibilities
